# Source Record
- Source: Textual documentation home page
- Scope captured: top-level guide, reference, and widget structure

# Why It Matters
This is the upstream contract for the terminal UI framework that powers the interactive pipeline experience. It is most relevant for app lifecycle, widgets, layout, screens, workers, and testing.

# Key Excerpts
> The docs navigation emphasizes App Basics, Styles, Layout, Events and Messages, Actions, Reactivity, Widgets, Screens, Workers, and Testing.

> Textual presents both a tutorial/guide path and a large reference/API surface, which is useful when the KB needs to explain why the repo uses a TUI for long-running commands.

- Captured from the rendered markdown landing page.
